Affordable Housing

Working to preserve and expand affordable housing options in the Northeast Neighborhood as Bozeman grows.

Committee Contact

housing@nenabozeman.org

As Bozeman’s housing costs continue to rise, the Affordable Housing Committee works to ensure the Northeast Neighborhood remains accessible to residents of all incomes. We engage with developers, city planners, and policymakers to advocate for affordable housing solutions.

Our Approach

  • Monitoring and commenting on development proposals
  • Advocating for inclusionary zoning policies
  • Supporting community land trust initiatives
  • Connecting residents with housing resources

Resources

  • Bozeman Housing Action Plan
  • Montana Community Development Corporation
  • NeighborWorks Montana

Northeast Neighborhood Association

Bozeman, Montana's Last Best Neighborhood

Meetings: Third Thursday, 6:30 PM
Beall Park Recreation Center
